s3.websiteconfiguration.CfnAbout: Specifies website configuration parameters for an Amazon S3 bucket.

s3.websiteconfiguration.ErrorDocument.Description: The name of the error document for the website.

s3.websiteconfiguration.IndexDocument.Description: The name of the index document for the website.

s3.websiteconfiguration.RedirectAllReque.Description: The redirect behavior for every request to this bucket's website endpoint.  If you specify this property, you can't specify any other property.

s3.websiteconfiguration.RoutingRules.Description: Rules that define when a redirect is applied and the redirect behavior.
